description: Hello, I'm Büşra. I'm a web developer with experience working with React, Typescript, Express and Prisma. I care about writing clean code and building maintainable, scalable projects. Currently working on a Next.js focused web app.

weatherby.desc: A minimal app for tracking current weather, humidity, and wind speed.
details: Search any city or select a location via interactive map.
Live location time updates for selected location.
Dynamic weather data pulled from OpenWeather.

school-timetable-maker.desc: A web app that creates timetables for schools with custom teachers and classes.
details: Create a schedule program for years from 1 to 12.
Save previously created programs and view them.
Download a pdf version of the program.

library-api.desc: A RESTful API that provides book data including titles, authors, genres, and publication years.
details: Provides endpoints for listing all books or fetching individual book details.
Supports filtering by title, author, or genre.
